traits.locale_text:
While in combat, the user is under the {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} effect. It cannot be removed.
Whenever the user suffers damage from {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g}, they also suffer 1 stack of Perplexed for 2 rounds.
If the user has {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} also deals damage to them.

While in combat, the user is under the {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} effect. It cannot be removed.
Whenever the user suffers damage from {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g}, they also suffer 1 stack of Perplexed for 2 rounds.
If the user has {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} also deals damage to them.
While in combat, the user is under the {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} effect. It cannot be removed.

While in combat, the user is under the {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} effect. It cannot be removed.
Whenever the user suffers damage from {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g}, they also suffer +1 stack of Perplexed for 2 rounds.
If the user has a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} also deals damage to them.

While in combat, the user is under the {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} effect. It cannot be removed.
Whenever the user suffers {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} from {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g}, they also suffer +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}Perplexed{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
If the user has a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}, {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} also deals damage to them.

languages.text: Обладатель аугмента во время боя находится под воздействием эффекта {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}гальванический резонанс{/g}. Его нельзя снять.
languages.original_text: While in combat, the user is under the {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} effect. It cannot be removed.

traits.locale_text:
Обладатель аугмента во время боя находится под воздействием эффекта {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}гальванический резонанс{/g}. Его нельзя снять.
Всякий раз, когда обладатель аугмента получает {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g} от {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}гальванического резонанса{/g}, он также получает 1 уровень {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}замешательства{/g} на 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}.
Если у обладателя аугмента {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}покалечена правая рука{/g}, {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}гальванический резонанс{/g} также наносит ему урон.

Обладатель аугмента во время боя находится под воздействием эффекта {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}гальванический резонанс{/g}. Его нельзя снять.
Всякий раз, когда обладатель аугмента получает {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g} от {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}гальванического резонанса{/g}, он также получает 1 уровень {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}замешательства{/g} на 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}.
Если у обладателя аугмента {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}покалечена правая рука{/g}, {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}гальванический резонанс{/g} также наносит ему урон.

languages.text: Mientras dure el combate, el usuario se halla bajo el efecto {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}resonancia galvánica{/g}. Este efecto no puede eliminarse.
languages.original_text: While in combat, the user is under the {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} effect. It cannot be removed.

traits.locale_text: Mientras dure el combate, el usuario se halla bajo el efecto {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}resonancia galvánica{/g}. Este efecto no puede eliminarse.

languages.text: Im Kampf ist der Nutzer mit dem Effekt {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}Galvanikresonanz{/g} belegt. Dieser kann nicht entfernt werden.
languages.original_text: While in combat, the user is under the {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} effect. It cannot be removed.

traits.locale_text: Im Kampf ist der Nutzer mit dem Effekt {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}Galvanikresonanz{/g} belegt. Dieser kann nicht entfernt werden.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, çatışmadayken {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanik yankılaşım{/g} etkisi altındadır. Bu etki, ortadan kaldırılamaz.
languages.original_text: While in combat, the user is under the {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} effect. It cannot be removed.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcı, çatışmadayken {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanik yankılaşım{/g} etkisi altındadır. Bu etki, ortadan kaldırılamaz.

languages.text: En situation de combat, l'utilisateur est sous l'effet de {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}Résonance galvanique{/g}, qui ne peut pas être supprimé.
languages.original_text: While in combat, the user is under the {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} effect. It cannot be removed.

traits.locale_text: En situation de combat, l'utilisateur est sous l'effet de {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}Résonance galvanique{/g}, qui ne peut pas être supprimé.

languages.text: 战斗中，使用者始终处于无法移除的{g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}电激共振{/g}效果下。
languages.original_text: While in combat, the user is under the {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} effect. It cannot be removed.

traits.locale_text: 战斗中，使用者始终处于无法移除的{g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}电激共振{/g}效果下。

languages.text: 戦闘中、使用者は{g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}ガルヴァニック・レゾナンス{/g}効果を受ける。これは解除できない。
languages.original_text: While in combat, the user is under the {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} effect. It cannot be removed.

traits.locale_text: 戦闘中、使用者は{g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}ガルヴァニック・レゾナンス{/g}効果を受ける。これは解除できない。
